title: Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2023
fullText:
Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2023 (Public Law 117-328).
An Act making consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2023, and for other purposes.

Division U, Section 233 amended 38 U.S.C. § 3103 to insert eligibility extensions for veterans who are prevented from participating in vocational rehabilitation because of a 'covered reason', including temporary or permanent school closures due to emergency situations.
plainEnglish: Added a new rule extending the 12-year basic eligibility window for veterans who are blocked from training because their school closed or due to another emergency.
veteranUse: Cite this when your 12-year window is expiring and you had past training disruptions due to school closures or disasters.
